questions: What is the specific opportunistic infection diagnosed?
For Pneumocystis Carinii Pneumonia (PCP), what is the patient's severity (Severe, Moderate, or Mild)?
For Pneumocystis Carinii Pneumonia (PCP), what is the patient's PaO2 level breathing room air at rest (in mmHg)?
For Oesophageal Candidiasis, what is the patient's current CD4 count?
For Cryptococcosis, what is the patient's current CD4 count?
For Toxoplasmosis, is cerebral edema present? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have any allergies, specifically to sulfa drugs, trimethoprim, pyrimethamine, or amphotericin B? (Yes/No)
Is the patient pregnant or breastfeeding? (Yes/No)
Is the patient receiving Antiretroviral Therapy (ART)? (Yes/No)
For Oesophageal Candidiasis, is the patient on ART and has achieved CD4 counts > 100? (Yes/No)
For Cryptococcosis, has the patient had a sustained CD4 response to ART (CD4 > 200) for > 3 months? (Yes/No)
